notes: Edge-traced outline captures the mantle and a vague arm cluster but loses the two long tentacles and most of the splayed arm anatomy from the photo, reading as a generic squid rather than this specific specimen.
specific_issues: both long tentacles from the photo are missing entirely
splayed arm crown reduced to a vague lobed mass instead of distinct arms with suckers
no almond eye with pupil placed where the photo's eye sits
stipple is uniform random noise rather than concentrated chromatophore fields matching the photo
mantle outline is a smoothed envelope that ignores the photo's translucent fin edges
fins read as part of the mantle silhouette rather than separate fin lobes
overall reads as photo-trace of an alpha mask, not a scientific plate
